mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evaluation_tag_relation etr INNER JOIN eval_tag et ON etr.tag_id = et.id WHERE etr.driver_id = #{driverId} AND et.tag_type = 1 AND et.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evaluation_tag_relation etr INNER JOIN eval_tag et ON etr.tag_id = et.id WHERE etr.driver_id = #{driverId} AND et.is_deleted = 0
